title: aegilops neglecta subsp. contracta
intro: Aegilops neglecta subsp. contracta, also known as a wild grass or a type of wheat grass, is a plant species belonging to the wheat family (Poaceae). The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory compounds, which have been used to treat various health conditions, including digestive issues and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Aegilops neglecta subsp. contracta include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to alleviate symptoms of colds, coughs, and other respiratory issues.
